name: Bandit Heeler
description:
Bandit is one of the members of the Heeler family. He is the husband of Chilli, the father of Bluey and Bingo, the younger brother of Rad and the older brother of Stripe, brother-in-law of Trixie, son of Bob and Chris, the uncle of Muffin and Socks and the son-in-law of Mort. He works as an archaeologist.

When he was younger, Bandit was a bully to his younger brother Stripe as a child. One day, Bandit was jinxed by Rad, so he was not allowed to speak until someone said his name.

At a holiday park at age ten, he met Chilli or possibly someone who looked similar to her; she now has no memory of this occurring though she and her family has spent vacations there.[4]

He would often make trips to a creek in his childhood.[5]

Later, when both were adults, he met Chilli in England, which she believes is their first meeting. There is “some dispute” as to the exact circumstances, but it apparently took place “at a party in London.”[6] Chilli would later recall that Bandit had a finger up his nose when they first met.[7]

Eventually, the two began dating, and later on went on a backpacking trip to Italy. While there, Bandit proposed to Chilli, and she accepted; the pair were later married.[8] Among the wedding guests were Frisky and Rad, the latter of whom "probably" fell into a swimming pool.[9]

Some time afterwards, Chilli became pregnant, later giving birth to Bluey.[10] Bandit would later claim to have “wrecked his back changing Bluey's nappies.” Bingo, their younger daughter, was born a couple of years later.

Bandit is a Blue Heeler with blue, light blue, tan and black fur. He has light blue feet, hands, outer belly, outer muzzle and eyebrows, blue legs, arms, tail tip and torso, tan belly, muzzle and inner ears, and black tail stem, head and outer ears. He also has a black nose and beard whiskers on his muzzle.
